'''鈭歝h-th-z-g''' ('''kachathzegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyth|kyth]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-z-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyth|kyth]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-th-z-g
|-
! Lemma
| kachathzegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichathzegoko|thichathzegoko]] || [[word:jichathzegoko|jichathzegoko]] || [[word:shichathzegoko|shichathzegoko]] || [[word:kichathzegoko|kichathzegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochathzegoko|thochathzegoko]] || [[word:jochathzegoko|jochathzegoko]] || [[word:shochathzegoko|shochathzegoko]] || [[word:kochathzegoko|kochathzegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chathzegoko|th忙chathzegoko]] || [[word:j忙chathzegoko|j忙chathzegoko]] || [[word:sh忙chathzegoko|sh忙chathzegoko]] || [[word:k忙chathzegoko|k忙chathzegoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachathzegoko|thachathzegoko]] || [[word:jachathzegoko|jachathzegoko]] || [[word:shachathzegoko|shachathzegoko]] || [[word:kachathzegoko|kachathzegoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
